backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Product and TarotService types with CRUD operations, stored in Maps, supporting product filtering by type/trending and tarot service management with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (service card banner images, site retheme, gallery updates) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose, styling approach, and key functionality within the Mystic Moon with Ishita app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with SEO meta tags, viewport settings, and page title set to 'Mystic Moon with Ishita - Spiritual Wisdom & Healing'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component assembling all page sections (Header, Hero, About, Services, ServicesGallery, ImportantNotes, Reviews, ProductCatalog, Footer) over a crystal-gradient background with decorative radial glow overlays.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying Ishita's circular portrait, bio text, and three stat badges (Experience, Clients, Confidential) styled with the steel blue crystal-moon color palette.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, service/shop listings, Instagram link, and a copyright bar for Mystic Moon with Ishita.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header displaying the Mystic Moon logo and site name, with a click-to-scroll-to-top button and an SVG fallback if the image fails to load.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with animated logo, tagline, main heading, star rating, and CTA buttons linking to the services and products sections.
frontend/src/components/ImportantNotes.t: Displays a four-card grid of policy notes covering delivery time, format, restrictions, and confidentiality for tarot reading services.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single shop product showing its image, type badge, trending badge, description, formatted price, and an Instagram order link.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Crystal shop section with filter tabs (All, Crystals, Bracelets, Pendulums) that fetch and display products via React Query, with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Testimonials section that renders a grid of 5-star customer reviews sourced from a static data file, showing reviewer name, date, text, and category badge.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a tarot services pricing page with categorized service cards (mini readings, love, career, etc.) using static price data and a decorative hand-pentacle SVG illustration. Includes an Instagram CTA button and fetches a service catalog via a custom query hook.
Displays a responsive image gallery grid of tarot service categories using data from serviceGalleryImages, with hover overlays and a fallback SVG card when images fail to load. Includes a section header and an Instagram CTA button.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Defines the Product interface and exports a static array of crystal, bracelet, and pendulum products with IDs, descriptions, base prices (₹500 each), and image paths.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Defines the Review interface and exports a static array of customer reviews categorized as either 'Tarot Session' or 'Crystal Purchase', with names, text, and dates.
frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.t: Defines the ServiceGalleryImage interface and exports a static array mapping five tarot service categories to their labels and banner image paths.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, switching between anonymous and authenticated actors based on the current Internet Identity. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products and tarot services via the backend actor, including queries for all products, by type, trending, and tarot services by category, plus mutations for adding and updating them.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a blue-crystal-moon color theme (light and dark modes) along with utility classes for gradients, text effects, and sparkle borders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting it to the root DOM element.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Provides two utility functions: one to calculate a final price by adding a fixed ₹400 markup to a base price, and one to format a number as an Indian Rupee string.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with brand-specific color tokens (crystal, moon, sparkle), custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Lato), box shadows, gradients, and keyframe animations for a mystical blue-crystal-moon design system.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including version, summary, architectural notes, existing features, and image requirements for a tarot/mystical website themed around a blue crystal and moon logo.
